wash_trade_concerns: Orca's on-chain swap volume on Solana appears broadly organic given its concentrated-liquidity AMM design and verifiable pool activity on Solana Explorer, but thin ORCA token markets on CEXs (low reported volume relative to circulating supply) make wash-trading on those venues difficult to rule out without paid analytics.
rationale: As of mid-July 2025, Orca remains one of Solana's top DEXs by TVL; DefiLlama reported Orca TVL in the range of $150–$200 million USD in Q2 2025, though the exact current figure requires live API confirmation. Granular DAU, WAU, MAU, and new-address metrics for Orca are not published in any free public dashboard (Dune public dashboards exist but require account-level queries that are not freely surfaced as static figures). Exchange-flow data (CEX inflow/outflow in USD) for ORCA is not available on Coinglass free tier or any other freely accessible aggregator as of this research date. Holder cohort breakdowns (LTH vs STH) are a Glassnode paid-tier feature for Solana SPL tokens and are not available on the free studio for ORCA specifically.
